tasks.task: Integrate Ollama DeepSeek OCR as optional provider with fallback to Vision (see implementation plan).
Upgrade local OCR to configurable Ollama vision models with Google Vision fallback.

questions.question: Does deepseek-ocr:3b provide word/line bounding boxes needed for redaction and Find→Replace positioning (local spike showed only a single block box)?

decisions.decision: Use direct local Ollama HTTP with network entitlement and auto-prefer DeepSeek OCR when available; fallback to Vision on failure.
Default local AI model for text tasks is deepseek-r1:8b (best speed/latency in current local list); other local models remain optional via Settings.
DeepSeek OCR boxes are used for OCR overlay only; Vision remains the source of truth for redaction/Find→Replace boxes.
Do not accept line/block boxes for redaction; use Vision for redaction/Find→Replace even when DeepSeek is available.
AI interaction logs are in-memory per run by default, with an opt-in setting to persist between launches.
Default local OCR model is qwen2.5vl:7b with minicpm-v:8b and deepseek-ocr:3b as fallbacks; cloud OCR is optional and auto-fallback when enabled.

worklog.note: Updated plan decisions: allow local Ollama access via network entitlement; auto-prefer DeepSeek OCR with fallback to Vision.

Ran local Ollama spike with documented <image> + <|grounding|> prompts; line-level boxes appeared with '<|grounding|>Extract the text in the image.' on simple layouts, but word-level boxes were not observed.
Decision: hybrid OCR path (DeepSeek overlay only when no redaction/Find→Replace is active; Vision handles redaction/replace boxes).
Implemented local AI tools UI, settings, model selection, and AI interaction activity log using local Ollama only.
Added DeepSeek provider injection protocol + OCR provider selection/fallback tests; sanity-fast passed.
Added DeepSeek overlay timeout guard (per-page) and updated plan status to in-progress for cancellation hardening.
Added QuickFix cancellation checks in engine/options model and threaded Task.isCancelled through QuickFix runs.
Updated README with Ollama setup/troubleshooting, added LocalAITaskRunner and AIInteractionStore tests, and introduced prompt/response truncation in logs.
Added rollout notes to CHANGELOG and a feedback checklist in README; marked P4.1 done.
Renamed AI Tools tab copy, split QuickFix/AI panes for resizing, and improved AI timeout handling with longer requests and clearer messaging.
Added user-configurable AI request timeout in Settings and page selection for summary in AI Tools.
Added per-task model picker in AI Tools and recorded progress in the implementation plan.
Added plan item to support PNG/JPEG inputs for OCR flows.
Recorded plan assumption that DeepSeek OCR can accept PNG/JPEG inputs via Ollama.
Cancelled in-flight Reader open on close and reset loading flags to prevent reopen after user close.
Reset Studio loading state on close to prevent a stuck loading overlay after canceling open.
Implemented PNG/JPEG inputs in AI Tools: image selection/drop, conversion to PDF for OCR, and AI tasks OCRing images when needed.
Added optional AI auto-crop/deskew preprocessing for image inputs before OCR.
Added VisionOCRProvider wrapper and updated plan statuses (P2.1/P2.12 done).
Expanded P5.1 into sub-items: image OCR quality pass, DeepSeek prompt/parser hardening, performance/caching, and OCR quality metrics.
Started P5.1a: added image enhancement pipeline (contrast/shadow/sharpen) and DPI normalization for image→PDF conversion.
Completed P5.1 sub-items: DeepSeek prompt retries/box parsing, OCR caching/throttling, and OCR report metrics.
Completed availability checks (<1s), UI status in Options, and progress updates during QuickFix runs.
Updated README/CHANGELOG with DeepSeek status, OCR report, image preprocessing, and progress updates.
Marked implementation plan as implemented/done.
Added local OCR model selection, cloud OCR fallback path, and updated OCR reporting to include local/cloud usage.
Pinned QuickFix local OCR default model to qwen2.5vl:7b.
Added a Quick Verify action in QuickFix options to validate local OCR models.
Added Reader toolbar entry points for QuickFix/AI Tools and an Open Result button in AI Tools.
Prompt for a writable output location when QuickFix cannot save next to the input file.
Added CI_CODE_SIGNING=0 switch in scripts/ci_run.sh to disable code signing for local tests.
Persisted output-directory security-scoped bookmarks for QuickFix saves when the source folder is not writable.
Added a Settings action to clear saved QuickFix output folder bookmarks.
